calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joseph G. Tursi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Apparel Triangle, LLC.
Charles Muller, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Geertz Printing Co., Inc.
Default entered against defendant on May 29, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 27, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Apparel Triange, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Geertz Printing Co., Inc. as follows:

Rent/Damages - $35,954.54.
Attorney's Fees - $2,766.65.
Costs - $1,841.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,562.69.

Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 15 Apparel Way, San Francisco, CA 94124.
The Lease is Forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
